headline: Phillips 66 Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: PSX is projected to post a 55-cent loss in Q1 on $29.5B in revenues, with midstream revenues and product sales volumes expected to fall y/y.

raw.headline: Phillips 66 Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
raw.summary: PSX is projected to post a 55-cent loss in Q1 on $29.5B in revenues, with midstream revenues and product sales volumes expected to fall y/y.

headline: The committee debates if it's time to bet on the energy trade
summary: The Investment Committee debates how to trade the energy sector as it closes out a rough month.
